title: ImageDownsampler helper
description: Create AggregatorWidget/ImageDownsampler.swift with an async function downloadAndDownsample(url:targetSize:) that fetches a hero image URL and resizes it to targetSize (widget family point-size at @3x) using CGImageSourceCreateThumbnailAtIndex or UIGraphicsImageRenderer. The full-size image must not be retained in memory after downsampling. Returns UIImage? (nil on network error or invalid URL).
acceptance_criteria: ImageDownsampler.swift compiles in the widget target
Returned image dimensions are within targetSize bounds
Full-size bitmap is released after downsampling (no large intermediate allocation retained)
Returns nil gracefully for unreachable URLs or non-image responses
